name: Moulinvest SA
summary: Moulinvest SA produces and sells wood products in France. It manufactures wood panels, pellets, and lumbers; and generates electricity using cogeneration from biomass. The company also offers construction lumber and prefabricated solid wood walls. In addition, it provides structural cutting, laminated wood, glued wood, and CLT under the MassifBois brand; and outdoor landscaping and equestrian products, as well as stakes for arboriculture and viticulture under the Decovert brand name. The company was founded in 1916 and is based in Duni√É¬®res, France.
